title: Early War Goal Was to Install Hard Line Former President as Iran’s Leader
summary_full: An Israeli strike designed to free Mahmoud Ahmadinejad from house arrest in Tehran, U.S. officials said, was part of an effort to bring about regime change and put him in power.
summary_public: An Israeli strike designed to free Mahmoud Ahmadinejad from house arrest in Tehran, U.S. officials said, was part of an effort to bring about regime change and put him in power.

IL.label: negative
IL.evidence: An Israeli strike designed to free Mahmoud Ahmadinejad from house arrest
